LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR ASSAULT, BATTERY, SEXUAL BATTERY, FALSE IMPRISONMENT, NEGLIGENCE, INTENTIONAL, RECKLESS OR NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, AND SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES. MS. HOLLOWAY HAS NEITHER PLED THE STATUTORY BASIS FOR TORT LIABILITY NOR PLED EVERY MATERIAL FACT WITH PARTICULARITY. MS. HOLLOWAY WITHDRAWS HER UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES CAUSE OF ACTION. THE COMPLAINT IS NOT UNCERTAIN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Colin H. Jewell, Esq., of Cholakian & Associates, Tel. 650.871.9544, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the causes of action for assault, battery, sexual battery, false imprisonment, negligence, intentional, reckless or negligent infliction of severe emotional distress, and sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action for unfair business practices. Ms. Holloway has neither pled the statutory basis for tort liability nor pled every material fact with particularity. Ms. Holloway withdraws her unfair business practices cause of action. The complaint is not uncertain. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Colin H. Jewell, Esq., of Cholakian & Associates, Tel. 650.871.9544, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S PUNITIVE DAMAGE ALLEGATIONS AND PRAYER FOR INJUCTIVE RELIEF IN 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Granted. Ms. Holloway filed a notice of non-opposition. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
